历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including old Gaokao Science) were approximately 4645 → 4138 → 3897 → 3293 → 2844, showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward movement of about 1800 places in the past 4 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 2844 places; the enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Physics Category was 178 in 2021, 175 in 2022, 183 in 2023, 177 in 2024, 167 in 2025, and 170 in 2026, a slight expansion of 3 students compared to 2025, an increase of about 1.8%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University Rankings have been rising continuously, from 25th in 2021 → 23rd in 2024 → 21st in 2025 → 23rd in 2026, firmly among the top engineering universities nationwide; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 Gaokao cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (students beaten by local criminal forces, the university accused of bias and inaction), which may slightly affect some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 74th, with average reviews, and short video exposure at a mid-level; Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 7 A- and above disciplines, with national top-level strength in aerospace, computer, materials and other fields, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely aligned with the university's advantageous disciplines; the total number of Gaokao registrations in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 451,000, slightly decreasing from about 462,000 in 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 313,000 (321,000 in 2025), slightly easing competition pressure; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a western 985 university, with a relatively large enrollment scale in Anhui (about 170 in Physics Category), and stable cross-province application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan, the slight decrease in the total number of candidates in Anhui Province, the slight negative impact of reputation, and the sustained attraction from high Soft Science rankings, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to move forward from the 2025 baseline of 2844 but with a narrowed range; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2890, with a range of 2456–3324.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including old Gaokao liberal arts) were approximately 1670 → 1649 → 1495 → 1684 → 1730, fluctuating within the 1500–1730 range with no clear trend, with a 2025 baseline of about 1730. The enrollment plan for this university in Anhui for History Category was 8 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 16 in 2024, and 19 in 2025, with a planned 17 for 2026, a reduction of 2 compared to 2025, a decrease of about 10.5%, intensifying competition. It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 23rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in the country.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The reputation evaluation for the 2026 Gaokao cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents, which may slightly affect some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 74th, with average reviews; the university is strong in engineering, and the History Category majors (Economics and Trade, but the overall 985 level still has strong appeal for liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of Gaokao registrations in Anhui Province for 2026 is about 451,000, with an estimated 138,000 History Category candidates (141,400 in 2025), a slight decrease; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a western 985 university, with a small enrollment scale in Anhui for History Category (about 17), and cross-provincial application enthusiasm is average.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable fluctuation of historical rankings, the planned enrollment reduction of about 10.5% in 2026, a slight decrease in History Category candidates in Anhui, and a slight negative impact from reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will move forward compared to the 2025 baseline of 1730 (intensified competition); the predicted minimum ranking is about 1591, with a range of 1352–1830.
